name: doordash_restaurant_data
description: Restaurant-level performance data for 100 DoorDash restaurants in Atlanta. Includes managed and unmanaged restaurants with operational metrics, customer engagement data, and sales performance.

columns.name: restaurant_id
columns.description: Unique restaurant identifier (R001-R100)

columns.name: restaurant_name
columns.description: Restaurant business name

columns.name: cuisine_type
columns.description: Primary cuisine category

columns.name: city
columns.description: City where restaurant is located (all Atlanta)

columns.name: zip_code
columns.description: 5-digit ZIP code in the Atlanta metro area

columns.name: is_managed
columns.description: Whether the restaurant has a dedicated account manager (1=managed, 0=unmanaged)

columns.name: account_manager
columns.description: Name of assigned account manager (empty for unmanaged restaurants)

columns.name: monthly_orders
columns.description: Total orders fulfilled in the last 30 days

columns.name: avg_order_value
columns.description: Average dollar value per order

columns.name: monthly_revenue
columns.description: Gross revenue for the last 30 days (monthly_orders * avg_order_value)

columns.name: conversion_rate
columns.description: Ratio of orders to page views (NOTE: a few rows use 0-100 scale instead of 0-1 due to data entry inconsistency)

columns.name: page_views
columns.description: Number of restaurant page views in the last 30 days

columns.name: menu_item_count
columns.description: Number of active items on the restaurant menu

columns.name: has_photos
columns.description: Whether the restaurant has uploaded menu photos (1=yes, 0=no)

columns.name: avg_delivery_time_min
columns.description: Average delivery time in minutes over the last 30 days

columns.name: customer_rating
columns.description: Average customer rating on a 1-5 scale

columns.name: review_count
columns.description: Total number of customer reviews

columns.name: days_on_platform
columns.description: Number of days since the restaurant joined the platform

columns.name: has_pos_integration
columns.description: Whether the restaurant has POS system integration (1=yes, 0=no)

columns.name: uses_ads
columns.description: Whether the restaurant is currently running DoorDash ads (1=yes, 0=no)

columns.name: monthly_ad_spend
columns.description: Monthly advertising spend in USD (0 if uses_ads=0)

columns.name: order_method_online_pct
columns.description: Percentage of orders placed online (0-1 scale)

columns.name: order_method_phone_pct
columns.description: Percentage of orders placed by phone (complement of online)

columns.name: last_menu_update_days_ago
columns.description: Days since the restaurant last updated its menu

columns.name: signup_date
columns.description: Date the restaurant joined the DoorDash platform (YYYY-MM-DD)
